Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shaped coverings for the head having a brim and crown, or one of the two.
Cubierta para la cabeza que tiene un borde y coronilla, o uno de los dos.
Voorgevormde hoofddeksels met een rand en een bol, of één van beide.
戴在頭上、有固定形狀的覆蓋物，有帽緣及帽頂，或兩者之一。
Geformte Kopfbedeckung mit Krempe und Kopfteil, oder einem von beiden.
Rivestimenti per la testa con falda e corona, o uno dei due.
Cuatzahcayotl tlen yohui ipan totzotecon, tenyohualo huan tenhuaxxo, zo nochi ome tlen ni.
Coberturas moldadas para a cabeça com aba e coroa, ou uma das duas.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.
